tools.name: alertsResourceArn.listAlerts
tools.description: Lists the alerts that are associated with a MediaTailor channel assembly resource.

tools.name: channel.createChannel
tools.description: Creates a channel. For information about MediaTailor channels, see Working with channels in the MediaTailor User Guide.

tools.name: channel.createProgram
tools.description: Creates a program within a channel. For information about programs, see Working with programs in the MediaTailor User Guide.

tools.name: channel.deleteChannel
tools.description: Deletes a channel. For information about MediaTailor channels, see Working with channels in the MediaTailor User Guide.

tools.name: channel.deleteChannelPolicy
tools.description: The channel policy to delete.

tools.name: channel.deleteProgram
tools.description: Deletes a program within a channel. For information about programs, see Working with programs in the MediaTailor User Guide.

tools.name: channel.describeChannel
tools.description: Describes a channel. For information about MediaTailor channels, see Working with channels in the MediaTailor User Guide.

tools.name: channel.describeProgram
tools.description: Describes a program within a channel. For information about programs, see Working with programs in the MediaTailor User Guide.

tools.name: channel.getChannelPolicy
tools.description: Returns the channel's IAM policy. IAM policies are used to control access to your channel.

tools.name: channel.getChannelSchedule
tools.description: Retrieves information about your channel's schedule.

tools.name: channel.putChannelPolicy
tools.description: Creates an IAM policy for the channel. IAM policies are used to control access to your channel.

tools.name: channel.startChannel
tools.description: Starts a channel. For information about MediaTailor channels, see Working with channels in the MediaTailor User Guide.

tools.name: channel.stopChannel
tools.description: Stops a channel. For information about MediaTailor channels, see Working with channels in the MediaTailor User Guide.

tools.name: channel.updateChannel
tools.description: Updates a channel. For information about MediaTailor channels, see Working with channels in the MediaTailor User Guide.

tools.name: channel.updateProgram
tools.description: Updates a program within a channel.

tools.name: channels.listChannels
tools.description: Retrieves information about the channels that are associated with the current AWS account.

tools.name: configureLogs.configureLogsForChannel
tools.description: Configures Amazon CloudWatch log settings for a channel.

tools.name: configureLogs.configureLogsForPlaybackConfiguration
tools.description: Amazon CloudWatch log settings for a playback configuration.

tools.name: playbackConfiguration.deletePlaybackConfiguration
tools.description: Deletes a playback configuration. For information about MediaTailor configurations, see Working with configurations in AWS Elemental MediaTailor.

tools.name: playbackConfiguration.getPlaybackConfiguration
tools.description: Retrieves a playback configuration. For information about MediaTailor configurations, see Working with configurations in AWS Elemental MediaTailor.

tools.name: playbackConfiguration.putPlaybackConfiguration
tools.description: Creates a playback configuration. For information about MediaTailor configurations, see Working with configurations in AWS Elemental MediaTailor.

tools.name: playbackConfigurations.listPlaybackConfigurations
tools.description: Retrieves existing playback configurations. For information about MediaTailor configurations, see Working with Configurations in AWS Elemental MediaTailor.

tools.name: prefetchSchedule.createPrefetchSchedule
tools.description: Creates a prefetch schedule for a playback configuration. A prefetch schedule allows you to tell MediaTailor to fetch and prepare certain ads before an ad break happens. For more information about ad prefetching, see Using ad prefetching in the MediaTailor User Guide.

tools.name: prefetchSchedule.deletePrefetchSchedule
tools.description: Deletes a prefetch schedule for a specific playback configuration. If you call DeletePrefetchSchedule on an expired prefetch schedule, MediaTailor returns an HTTP 404 status code. For more information about ad prefetching, see Using ad prefetching in the MediaTailor User Guide.

tools.name: prefetchSchedule.getPrefetchSchedule
tools.description: Retrieves a prefetch schedule for a playback configuration. A prefetch schedule allows you to tell MediaTailor to fetch and prepare certain ads before an ad break happens. For more information about ad prefetching, see Using ad prefetching in the MediaTailor User Guide.

tools.name: prefetchSchedule.listPrefetchSchedules
tools.description: Lists the prefetch schedules for a playback configuration.

tools.name: sourceLocation.createLiveSource
tools.description: The live source configuration.

tools.name: sourceLocation.createSourceLocation
tools.description: Creates a source location. A source location is a container for sources. For more information about source locations, see Working with source locations in the MediaTailor User Guide.

tools.name: sourceLocation.createVodSource
tools.description: The VOD source configuration parameters.

tools.name: sourceLocation.deleteLiveSource
tools.description: The live source to delete.

tools.name: sourceLocation.deleteSourceLocation
tools.description: Deletes a source location. A source location is a container for sources. For more information about source locations, see Working with source locations in the MediaTailor User Guide.

tools.name: sourceLocation.deleteVodSource
tools.description: The video on demand (VOD) source to delete.

tools.name: sourceLocation.describeLiveSource
tools.description: The live source to describe.

tools.name: sourceLocation.describeSourceLocation
tools.description: Describes a source location. A source location is a container for sources. For more information about source locations, see Working with source locations in the MediaTailor User Guide.

tools.name: sourceLocation.describeVodSource
tools.description: Provides details about a specific video on demand (VOD) source in a specific source location.

tools.name: sourceLocation.listLiveSources
tools.description: Lists the live sources contained in a source location. A source represents a piece of content.

tools.name: sourceLocation.listVodSources
tools.description: Lists the VOD sources contained in a source location. A source represents a piece of content.

tools.name: sourceLocation.updateLiveSource
tools.description: Updates a live source's configuration.

tools.name: sourceLocation.updateSourceLocation
tools.description: Updates a source location. A source location is a container for sources. For more information about source locations, see Working with source locations in the MediaTailor User Guide.

tools.name: sourceLocation.updateVodSource
tools.description: Updates a VOD source's configuration.

tools.name: sourceLocations.listSourceLocations
tools.description: Lists the source locations for a channel. A source location defines the host server URL, and contains a list of sources.

tools.name: tags.listTagsForResource
tools.description: A list of tags that are associated with this resource. Tags are key-value pairs that you can associate with Amazon resources to help with organization, access control, and cost tracking. For more information, see Tagging AWS Elemental MediaTailor Resources.

tools.name: tags.tagResource
tools.description: The resource to tag. Tags are key-value pairs that you can associate with Amazon resources to help with organization, access control, and cost tracking. For more information, see Tagging AWS Elemental MediaTailor Resources.

tools.name: tags.untagResource
tools.description: The resource to untag.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
